textPlain: If you want a live version of most of the site (including tracking new comments in items you've already looked at), I made this to improve my React skills when the HN API first came out:https://insin.github.io/react-hn
Source code: https://github.com/jerbear2008/hn-liveAnd live firebase source (run by HN) used for this: https://github.com/HackerNews/API
